{{Quote|I couldn't agree with you more, pal..I could really get to like it here, too!|Han Solo|<ref name="marvel7" />}}
'''Locru's Central Saloon''' was a cantina near the center of [[Tun Aduban]] on [[Aduba-3/Legends|Aduba-3]]. It was founded by [[Locru]]. It also served as an inn, charging twelve [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] a night.

Frequent customers included [[Warto]] and [[Azoora]].

It was here that [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] recruited spacers to fight [[Serji-X Arrogantus]], forming the Eight for Aduba-3.

If approached from the direction of [[Spacer's Hill]], it was the third structure to the left past the [[Town Circle]].

A set of stairs led up from the bar to the lobby, adjacent to which were bedrooms where customers could stay.
